zoteroconnector-import-invalid-subpage: The subpage should be in the form `reference/{id}` or `attachment/{id}`
zoteroconnector-no-redirect: The requested attachment could not be retrieved
zoteroconnector-import-error-top: The value top has special meaning and is not a real key
zoteroconnector-import-reference-is-atta: Key $1 corresponds to an attachment, switching import mode
zoteroconnector-import-reference-no-chan: No reference page changed, latest version of [[$1]] already present
zoteroconnector-upload-attachment-no-cha: No attachment upload performed, latest version of [[:File:$1.pdf]] already present
zoteroconnector-attachment-page-updated: No attachment upload performed, latest version of [[:File:$1.pdf]] already present, but page content updated
zotero-non-file-with-version: Non-files that attempt to store a file version
zotero-file-with-invalid-version: Files that attempt to store an invalid version
zotero-non-reference-with-title: Non-references that attempt to use the reference title display
